word: G1723 - ἐναγκαλίζομαι - enankalízomai - en-ang-kal-id'-zom-ahee - Take up in arms

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐναγκαλίζομαι

- Transliteration: Enagkalizomai

- Phonetic: en-ang-kal-id'-zom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to take into one's arms, embrace

- Origin: from G1722 and a derivative of G43

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and a derivative of G43; to take in one´ s arms that is embrace: - take up in arms.
